HRIEUV Movie of an Active Region near the Limb¶

This notebook makes a movie of the HRIEUV 17.4 nm images of an active region near the limb, which is observed by Solar Orbiter on 2024-10-15 during a Major Flare Watch SOOP. We show the WOW-enhanced images to highlight the fine structures in the transition region and corona. These structures show morphological similarities to the chromospheric structures like dynamic fibrils in mossy and non-mossy plage, as well as sunspot umbrae and penumbrae, and lower-lying arch filaments.

Note: The internal hyperlink only works on GitHub Pages or nbviewer. Do not click when viewing the notebook on GitHub.

Import libraries and plotting configurations¶

In [1]:
import numpy as np 
import sunpy 
import sunpy.map 
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt 
import matplotlib.patheffects as path_effects
from matplotlib import animation
from matplotlib import patches
from astropy.visualization import ImageNormalize
from astropy.time import Time
from glob import glob 
from tqdm.notebook import tqdm
In [2]:
ms_style_dict = {'text.usetex': True, 'font.family': 'serif', 'axes.linewidth': 1.2,
                 'xtick.major.width': 1.2, 'xtick.major.size': 4,
                 'ytick.major.width': 1.2, 'ytick.major.size': 4,
                 'xtick.minor.width': 1.2, 'xtick.minor.size': 2,
                 'ytick.minor.width': 1.2, 'ytick.minor.size': 2,
                 'xtick.direction': 'in', 'ytick.direction': 'in',
                 'text.latex.preamble': r'\usepackage[T1]{fontenc}'
                 r'\usepackage{amsmath}' r'\usepackage{siunitx}'
                 r'\sisetup{detect-all=True}' r'\usepackage{fixltx2e}'}

Load pre-processed HRIEUV data¶

In [3]:
hri_map_files = sorted(glob("../../data/20241015/hri_crop_wow/*.fits"))
In [4]:
hri_maps = sunpy.map.Map(hri_map_files)
In [5]:
hri_date_ear = []
for map_ in hri_maps:
    hri_date_ear.append(map_.meta["date_ear"])
hri_date_ear = Time(hri_date_ear)

select regions to highlight the fine structures¶

In [7]:
x1_list = [100, 330, 350, 450, 225, 200, 200, 320]
x2_list = [300, 430, 430, 511, 410, 340, 300, 450]
y1_list = [350, 320, 295, 270, 230, 60, 150, 145]
y2_list = [500, 350, 310, 300, 270, 120, 200, 220]
fig, ax = plt.subplots(figsize=(8,8), layout="constrained")
ax.imshow(hri_maps[500].data, cmap="sdoaia171", origin="lower")
ax.grid("on")

for x1, x2, y1, y2 in zip(x1_list, x2_list, y1_list, y2_list):
    rect = patches.Rectangle((x1, y1), x2 - x1, y2 - y1, linewidth=2, edgecolor="r", facecolor="none")
    ax.add_patch(rect)
In [8]:
def create_hri_color_img(hri_data,
    x1_list, x2_list,
    y1_list, y2_list,
    norm, cmap1, cmap2
    ):

    cmap_apply_1 = plt.get_cmap(cmap1)
    cmap_apply_2 = plt.get_cmap(cmap2)

    hri_data_norm = norm(hri_data)

    hri_rgba = cmap_apply_1(hri_data_norm)
    for x1, x2, y1, y2 in zip(x1_list, x2_list, y1_list, y2_list):
        hri_rgba[y1:y2+1, x1:x2+1] = cmap_apply_2(hri_data_norm[y1:y2+1, x1:x2+1])

    return hri_rgba
In [9]:
test_hri_rgba = create_hri_color_img(
    hri_maps[500].data,
    x1_list, x2_list,
    y1_list, y2_list,
    ImageNormalize(),
    "gray", "sdoaia171"
)

In [22]:
hri_rgba_array = np.zeros((*hri_maps[0].data.shape, len(hri_maps), 4))
norm_hri = ImageNormalize(vmin=-0.1, vmax=1.9)
for ii in tqdm(range(len(hri_maps))):
    hri_rgba_array[:, :, ii] = create_hri_color_img(
        hri_maps[ii].data,
        x1_list, x2_list,
        y1_list, y2_list,
        norm_hri,
        "gray", "sdoaia171"
    )

  0%|          | 0/1012 [00:00<?, ?it/s]

Figure 10¶

HRIEUV observation on a near-limb active region revealing a great amount of fine EUV structures related to the underlying chromosphere. Region A: dynamic fibrils in non-mossy plage; B: surges above a sunspot light bridge; C: short dynamic fibrils in umbra; D: inclined superpenumbral fibrils; E: (arch) filaments; F: inclined fibrils at active region moss; G: dynamic fibrils in mossy plage.

In [79]:
with plt.rc_context(ms_style_dict):
    fig = plt.figure(figsize=(5,5), layout="constrained")
    ax = fig.add_subplot(111, projection=hri_maps[0].wcs)
    im = ax.imshow(hri_rgba_array[:, :, 500], origin="lower")

    ax.set_xlabel("Helioprojective Latitude (Solar-Y)", fontsize=12)
    ax.set_ylabel("Helioprojective Longitude (Solar-X)", fontsize=12)
    ax.grid("on", alpha=0.5, lw=0.8, ls=":")
    ax.set_title(r"HRI\textsubscript{EUV} $t_{\oplus}$ " + hri_date_ear[500].strftime("%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S"), fontsize=12)
    ax.tick_params(axis="both", labelsize=12)

    ax.text(100 - 30, 500 - 10, r"\textbf{A}", fontsize=12, path_effects=[path_effects.withStroke(linewidth=2, foreground="black")],
        ha="left", va="top", color="white", bbox=dict(boxstyle="circle, pad=0.2", facecolor="#FB9966", edgecolor="none"))
    
    ax.text(335, 380, r"\textbf{B}", fontsize=12, path_effects=[path_effects.withStroke(linewidth=2, foreground="black")],
        ha="left", va="top", color="white", bbox=dict(boxstyle="circle, pad=0.2", facecolor="#FB9966", edgecolor="none"))

    ax.text(320, 310, r"\textbf{C}", fontsize=12, path_effects=[path_effects.withStroke(linewidth=2, foreground="black")],
        ha="left", va="top", color="white", bbox=dict(boxstyle="circle, pad=0.2", facecolor="#FB9966", edgecolor="none"))
    
    ax.text(455, 330, r"\textbf{D}", fontsize=12, path_effects=[path_effects.withStroke(linewidth=2, foreground="black")],
        ha="left", va="top", color="white", bbox=dict(boxstyle="circle, pad=0.2", facecolor="#FB9966", edgecolor="none"))
    
    ax.text(200, 265, r"\textbf{E}", fontsize=12, path_effects=[path_effects.withStroke(linewidth=2, foreground="black")],
        ha="left", va="top", color="white", bbox=dict(boxstyle="circle, pad=0.2", facecolor="#FB9966", edgecolor="none"))

    ax.text(175, 110, r"\textbf{E}", fontsize=12, path_effects=[path_effects.withStroke(linewidth=2, foreground="black")],
        ha="left", va="top", color="white", bbox=dict(boxstyle="circle, pad=0.2", facecolor="#FB9966", edgecolor="none"))

    ax.text(175, 195, r"\textbf{F}", fontsize=12, path_effects=[path_effects.withStroke(linewidth=2, foreground="black")],
        ha="left", va="top", color="white", bbox=dict(boxstyle="circle, pad=0.2", facecolor="#FB9966", edgecolor="none"))
    
    ax.text(460, 215, r"\textbf{G}", fontsize=12, path_effects=[path_effects.withStroke(linewidth=2, foreground="black")],
        ha="left", va="top", color="white", bbox=dict(boxstyle="circle, pad=0.2", facecolor="#FB9966", edgecolor="none"))

    fig.savefig("../../figs/ms_figure_png/hrieuv_discussion.png", dpi=300, bbox_inches="tight")
    fig.savefig("../../figs/ms_figure/hrieuv_discussion.pdf", bbox_inches="tight")
    plt.show()

Online Movie 3¶

In [82]:
def make_movie(hri_maps, hri_rgba_array, hri_date_ear,
               save_dir):
    with plt.rc_context(ms_style_dict):
        fig = plt.figure(figsize=(5,5), layout="constrained")
        ax = fig.add_subplot(111, projection=hri_maps[0].wcs)
        im = ax.imshow(hri_rgba_array[:, :, 500], origin="lower")

        ax.set_xlabel("Helioprojective Latitude (Solar-Y)", fontsize=12)
        ax.set_ylabel("Helioprojective Longitude (Solar-X)", fontsize=12)
        ax.grid("on", alpha=0.5, lw=0.8, ls=":")
        title =ax.set_title(r"HRI\textsubscript{EUV} $t_{\oplus}$ " + hri_date_ear[500].strftime("%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S"), fontsize=12)
        ax.tick_params(axis="both", labelsize=12)

        ax.text(100 - 30, 500 - 10, r"\textbf{A}", fontsize=12, path_effects=[path_effects.withStroke(linewidth=2, foreground="black")],
            ha="left", va="top", color="white", bbox=dict(boxstyle="circle, pad=0.2", facecolor="#FB9966", edgecolor="none"))
        
        ax.text(335, 380, r"\textbf{B}", fontsize=12, path_effects=[path_effects.withStroke(linewidth=2, foreground="black")],
            ha="left", va="top", color="white", bbox=dict(boxstyle="circle, pad=0.2", facecolor="#FB9966", edgecolor="none"))

        ax.text(320, 310, r"\textbf{C}", fontsize=12, path_effects=[path_effects.withStroke(linewidth=2, foreground="black")],
            ha="left", va="top", color="white", bbox=dict(boxstyle="circle, pad=0.2", facecolor="#FB9966", edgecolor="none"))
        
        ax.text(455, 330, r"\textbf{D}", fontsize=12, path_effects=[path_effects.withStroke(linewidth=2, foreground="black")],
            ha="left", va="top", color="white", bbox=dict(boxstyle="circle, pad=0.2", facecolor="#FB9966", edgecolor="none"))
        
        ax.text(200, 265, r"\textbf{E}", fontsize=12, path_effects=[path_effects.withStroke(linewidth=2, foreground="black")],
            ha="left", va="top", color="white", bbox=dict(boxstyle="circle, pad=0.2", facecolor="#FB9966", edgecolor="none"))

        ax.text(175, 110, r"\textbf{E}", fontsize=12, path_effects=[path_effects.withStroke(linewidth=2, foreground="black")],
            ha="left", va="top", color="white", bbox=dict(boxstyle="circle, pad=0.2", facecolor="#FB9966", edgecolor="none"))

        ax.text(175, 195, r"\textbf{F}", fontsize=12, path_effects=[path_effects.withStroke(linewidth=2, foreground="black")],
            ha="left", va="top", color="white", bbox=dict(boxstyle="circle, pad=0.2", facecolor="#FB9966", edgecolor="none"))
        
        ax.text(460, 215, r"\textbf{G}", fontsize=12, path_effects=[path_effects.withStroke(linewidth=2, foreground="black")],
            ha="left", va="top", color="white", bbox=dict(boxstyle="circle, pad=0.2", facecolor="#FB9966", edgecolor="none"))
    
        def update_fig(ii, im, title):
            im.set_data(hri_rgba_array[:, :, ii])
            title.set_text(r"HRI\textsubscript{EUV} $t_{\oplus}$ " + hri_date_ear[ii].strftime("%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S"))
            
            return None
        
        anim = animation.FuncAnimation(fig, update_fig, fargs=(im, title),
                                    frames=tqdm(range(1000)),
                                    blit=False)
        
        anim.save(save_dir, fps=30, dpi=150,writer='ffmpeg', 
            codec='libx264',
            # bitrate=6000,
            extra_args=['-pix_fmt', 'yuv420p'])
In [83]:
make_movie(hri_maps, hri_rgba_array, hri_date_ear, "../../figs/ms_movie/hrieuv_discussion.mp4")
